background: A committee of k people is to be chosen from a set of 7 women and 4 men.

task.query: How many ways are there to form the committee if the committee has 5 people, 3 women and 2 men?
How many ways are there to form the committee if the committee can be any positive size but must have equal numbers of women and men?
How many ways are there to form the committee if the committee has 4 people and at least 2 are women?
How many ways are there to form the committee if the committee has 4 people and one of them must be Mr. Good?
How many ways are there to form the committee if the committee has 4 people, two of each sex, and Mr. and Mrs. Good cannot both be on the committee?

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
